payload.description:
Run a feedback evaluation for CMG - EDU Branding and Matching using the newly created single-request ScoreVersion.

Scope:
- Evaluate scorecard 1039, score 45425, version c918b11b-8fca-4dbd-b7b4-d130e5f98e94
- Use recent feedback items with max_samples=100
- Capture evaluation ID and metrics (AC1, accuracy, precision, recall, confusion matrix)
- Record results in Kanbus

Assumption:
- "Recent feedback items" interpreted as last 30 days.
payload.title: Validate new Branding and Matching version with 100 recent feedback samples
